name: Carrot-Stuffed Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Raw carrots, scrubbed and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Scrub potatoes well, dry thoroughly, and pierce with a fork several times.
3. Place potatoes in the preheated oven and bake until tender.
4. Meanwhile, scrub carrots, dice them, and simmer in water until tender.
5. When the carrots are cooked, sauté onions in oil in a skillet.
6. Once clear, transfer onions to a deep bowl.
7. Remove carrots from heat when tender, drain well (reserve some liquid), and mash.
8. Pour mashed carrots into the bowl with onions.
9. Scoop out the soft potato flesh into a bowl containing the vegetable mixture, adding basil and mix with a fork.
10. If the mixture is too dry, add a little carrot juice or soy milk.
11. Season to taste and sprinkle with fresh parsley.
12. Fill potato shells with the filling, place on a cookie sheet, and return to the oven until heated through.
13. Serve topped with chives if desired.
Total calories per serving: 302
Fat: 3 grams
